---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: Suggest an improvement or new feature for Sailock
labels: feature
assignees: Sailok25

---

## Summary
A short, one-line description of the feature you are proposing.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve? What user need or limitation does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the behavior or UI change you have in mind. Be as specific as you can — code snippets, mockups, or examples are welcome.

## Alternatives Considered
Have you thought of other ways to solve this? Why do you prefer your proposed solution?

## Additional Context
Any other information, links, or screenshots that might be relevant.
